title: Explorer's Paradise
description: A 1.20.1 Fabric Modpack made for people who love minecraft exploration
body:
Explorer's Paradise is a 1.20.1 modpack filled with tons of mods that has mainly one goal : make exploration fun again.

This Modpacks aims to make minecraft feel new again, expending on tons of points and even adding some nostalgic mods (like twilight forest) to the modpack.

I hope you'll love it as much as i enjoyed the process of making it :)

It adds tons of different mods that each adds onto the whole experience and adds stuff where minecraft's vanilla game might fell short, this includes :

- New Dimensions :
![bumblezone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04f120ac8eca42dfa427f575fb1da4c240cc0141.jpeg)

![glacia](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/74f207da78f3ae021cc23f02c4439b002ae57037.jpeg)

![twilight forest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac1423576eb4bcd4c337967abdfddfc562dee41c.jpeg)


- New Biomes :

![biome 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c4051d8a057fb5ef5f4be0c3a5da23faf41aea3.jpeg)

![end biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fa27a2fa0106b950b52251e664b03c0b97d3a5d.jpeg)

![nether biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cafd00713275756bb929892790e0341ebd39c6db.jpeg)


- New Structures : 

![structure 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/868f32168d7622efb038978fb83c8b6f7bcd440c.jpeg)

![structure 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe5a6eb458710212ac935af1fc89859cc9371858.jpeg)

![structure 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7373d886c6984c30642765f8660e36f36b0170fa.jpeg)


- And Much More...

![Ender Dragon Fight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaf09bfc7ee3163dae9393eff4a4e911c68cede4.jpeg)

![Rocketship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b00aa597e9795bf1e1b7b9b802f2961a0601da6.jpeg)

![Plane](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59262772f395e798bf80c178586e961898183afd.jpeg)

![Boss](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dcfae8f68e1229339a419e330e55b111af8eaf2.jpeg)

PS : Do take note that mods like Deeper and Darker as well as ModernFix are present but disabled in the modpack because of crashing issues (while loading chunk with Deeper and darker and the whole end dimension with ModernFix).
While we do advice to keep them disabled for a smoother experience you have still the free will to enable them back if wanted but do take note that it could make the whole modpack unstable :)

PPS : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
